title: The Byzantine Generals Problem: Achieving Consensus with Traitors
description: A visual representation of the Byzantine Generals Problem, showing how a distributed network must coordinate a single action despite the presence of malicious actors (traitor generals) sending conflicting messages.
relationships: The Commanding General sends an order to all Lieutenants
A Traitor Lieutenant sends a conflicting order to other Lieutenants
Loyal Lieutenants must communicate with each other to compare orders and uncover the traitor
The network reaches a consensus on the correct order despite the deception
